channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Powerful Back-to-Back Earthquakes Kill at Least 164 in Venezuela
item.description: Venezuela's acting president said the death toll from twin earthquakes was likely to rise, with USGS modeling suggesting thousands may have been affected.

item.title: Couple's marriage proposal in Italy goes viral online
item.description: Joe's proposal to Sydney during their Italian vacation has garnered millions of views in recent weeks.

item.title: Oil prices drop to pre-war levels as Strait of Hormuz shipping resumes
item.description: Oil prices continue to fall as shipping activity increases in the Persian Gulf amid a stable U.S.-Iran agreement.

item.title: Dozens dead, hundreds injured in two Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Two strong earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday evening, causing significant casualties.
